(三朝北盟會編/卷24) In 1126.5.14 made 燕京留守. (三朝北盟會編/卷46) Died before Wanyan Liang's enthronment. (金史/卷82)

jurchen434 = { #賽不  賽不，保活里之後，世係不詳，暫定為吾侃朮特之子，狀貌魁偉，沉厚有大略，章宗時充護衛，明昌元年1190八月，由宿直將軍為寧化州刺史，未幾，遷武衛軍副都指揮使，泰和二年1202轉胡里改路節度使，四年，升武衛軍都指揮使，尋為殿前左副都點檢，後從平章僕散揆伐宋，為右翼都統，貞祐初1214拜同簽樞密院事，三年，遷知臨洮府事，兼陝西路副統軍，八月，知鳳翔府事，兼本路兵馬都緫管，俄為元帥右都監，興定元年二月，轉簽樞密院事，率軍討宋，四年三月，奉詔出兵河北招降，五年五月，奉詔引兵救河東，元光二年五月，復河中，正大元年五月，拜平章政事，未幾，轉尚書右丞相，五年，行尚書省于京兆，天興元年拜為左丞相，尋復致仕，年冬哀宗出逃，起復為右丞相、樞密使，兼左副元帥，封壽國公，扈從以行，二年七月，復詔行尚書省事於徐州，後蒙古圍城，自縊

[1170-1172] (金史/卷95) Later made 鎮歸德軍 [1172-1174]. (金史/卷95) Later made 西南路招討 [1174-1176]. (金史/卷95) Later made 知大興府事. (金史/卷95) Later made 殿前都點檢. (金史/卷95) 殿前都點檢 until 1176.10.15, on that day went as envot to Song. (金史/卷7) In 1176.11.23 arrived at Song court. (宋史/卷034) 殿前都點檢 until 1177.12.28, on that day made 尚書右丞. (金史/卷7) 尚書右丞 until 1178.10.27, on that day made 尚書左丞. (金史/卷7) 尚書左丞 until 1181.5.12, on that day made 平章政事，任國公. (金史/卷8 and 金史/卷95) 平章政事 until 1183.11.21, on that day made 上京留守 [until 1185]. (金史/卷8 and 金史/卷95) In 1185 made 知真定府事 [until 1186]. (金史/卷95) Later made 知平陽府事 [1186-1189]. (金史/卷95) Later made 知鳳翔府事 [1189-1190]. (金史/卷95) Later retired. (金史/卷95) In 1193 made 知廣寧府事. (金史/卷95) Soon after again retired. (金史/卷95)

jurchen1477 = { #蒲鮮萬奴  蒲鮮萬奴，女真人，出仕為尚厩局使，泰和六年1206從完顏賽不敗宋軍，1211年率軍參加野狐嶺之戰，宣宗即位，1213年授咸平路招討使，討耶律留哥，次年升遼東宣撫使，1214年宣宗南遷，1215年正月据東京稱天王，國號大真，年號天泰，十月降蒙古，1216年四月畔蒙古，改國號為東夏，改金上京會寧府為開元，都之，1233年貴由破渤海南京，殺蒲鮮萬奴
	name = "wannu_jurchen_name"

####################################### Dynasty: shijan - Chìzhǎn #######################################
jurchen1283 = { #赤盞暉  赤盞暉，字仲明，其先附于遼，居來州，以張爲氏，遼季以破賊功，授禮賓副使，領來、隰、遷、潤四州屯兵，天輔六年降，仍命領其眾，從闍母定興中府義、錦等州，及破張覺，皆與有功，以粟萬五千石助軍，授洺州刺史，從攻河間，加桂州管內觀察使，從睿宗經略山東，帥府承制加靜江軍節度使，平陝西師還，遷歸德軍節度使，十三年，復從大軍渡淮，還鎮，丁母憂，尋以舊職起復，既廢齊，爲安化軍節度使，天眷三年，復河南，宋人陷海州，帥府以登、萊、沂、密四州委暉，爲定海軍節度使，尋改濟南尹，累遷光祿大夫，俄以罪罷，久之，起爲昌武軍節度使，天德二年，遷南京留守，尋改河南路統軍使，授世襲猛安，拜尚書右丞，封河內郡王，歲餘，拜平章政事，封戴王，正隆初，出爲興平軍節度使，正隆降景國公，爲樞密副使，未幾，復爲左丞，封濟國公，尋除大興尹，封榮國公，薨，年六十五，謚武康
	name = "hui_jurchen_name"
	dynasty = shijan #赤盞
	culture = "jurchen"
	religion = "abkaism"

		birth = yes

jurchen1286 = { #赤盞尉忻  赤盞尉忻，字大用，上京人，當襲其父謀克，不願就，中明昌五年策論進士第，後選爲尚書省令史、吏部主事、監察御史，遷鎮南軍節度副使、息州刺史，改丹州，遷鄭州防禦使，權許州統軍使，元光二年正月，召爲戶部侍郎，未幾，權參知政事，二月，爲戶部尚書，權職如故，三月，拜參知政事，兼修國史，正大元年五月，拜尚書右丞，五年，致仕，居汴中，崔立之變明日，自縊而死，時年六十三
	name = "yuxin_jurchen_name"

	dynasty = KorChoe
	name = "Ch_ung_h_n_MB"
	culture = goguryeo
	religion = pundarika
	father = ChoeClan0
	martial = 14 #Trained in martial arts from youth like his Grand General father; led the coup against Yi Ui-min and suppressed multiple rebellions
	diplomacy = 10 #Managed complex balancing acts between the throne and his own regime; navigated relations with four successive kings
	intrigue = 18 #Staged an elaborate coup by feigning loyalty to Yi Ui-min for years; built the Kyojong Togam surveillance apparatus; survived more assassination attempts than any ruler in Korean history
	stewardship = 13 #Constructed a sophisticated dual administration — private institutions running parallel to the official state — and introduced the Bongsa Sipjo reform measures
	learning = 8
	trait = ambitious #Spent his entire adult life building a military regime that would dominate Goryeo for 60 years through his bloodline
	trait = arbitrary #Deposed and installed kings at his personal discretion, treating the throne as a political instrument with no regard for dynastic legitimacy
	trait = paranoid #Created the Kyojong Togam intelligence directorate specifically to hunt conspirators; survived assassination attempts by clerks, monks, eunuchs, and even the king himself
	trait = deceitful #Spent years feigning loyalty and submission to Yi Ui-min before launching his coup the moment Yi left the capital
	trait = education_martial_3 #Son of a Grand General, trained in martial arts from youth, rose from colonel to general, and proved a capable military commander in the field
	trait = strategist #Built a shadow government structure of remarkable sophistication; his institutional designs outlasted him by generations
	disallow_random_traits = yes
	1149.1.1={
		birth=yes
	}
	1197.1.1 = {
		add_trait = kinslayer_2 #Had his own brother Ch'oe Chung-su beheaded after a bloody struggle following the coup; he wept at the sight of his brother's head but gave the order regardless
	}
	1204.5.16 = {
		effect = {
			add_character_flag = ceremonial_regent_flag
			add_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law
		}
	}
	1211.6.16 = {
		effect = {
			add_character_flag = ceremonial_regent_flag
			add_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law
		}

	learning = 12 #Renowned calligrapher, considered one of the "Four Masters" of Korean calligraphy; praised for uncommon scholarly qualities
	trait = ambitious #Harboured open ambitions for the throne itself; spent his entire rule cementing hereditary dictatorial power for the Ch'oe clan
	trait = paranoid #Systematically purged political rivals and critics through widespread executions; relocated the court partly to secure his own hold on power
	trait = stubborn #Refused all Mongol demands to return the court to Gaegyeong, send royal hostages, or accept overseers — insisting on resistance for decades
	trait = brave #Personally went to the battlefield to lead Goryeo forces against the first Mongol invasion
	trait = education_martial_3 #Skilled commander who personally campaigned before becoming dictator and managed complex multi-front military resistance
	trait = lifestyle_poet #One of the "Four Masters" of Korean calligraphy; King Huijong requested him to write screen texts for royal halls receiving Jin dynasty envoys
	trait = strategist #His relocation of the government to Ganghwa Island — exploiting Mongol weakness in naval warfare — was a defining strategic masterstroke
